name: fidibaku
description: Drop-in, right-click commenting for local HTML reports and localhost apps with sidecar autosave.

scripts.check: node --check cli/index.js && node --check server/serve.js && node --check server/writer.js && node --check server/security.js && node --check client/review.js && node --check vite/index.js
scripts.smoke: repo=$PWD; tmp=$(mktemp -d) && cp examples/report.html "$tmp/report.html" && node cli/index.js bundle "$tmp/report.html" -o "$tmp/bundled.html" && node -e "require('./server/writer').writeSidecars(process.argv[1], {'example:intro': {group: 'Overview', label: 'Intro', text: 'Smoke test comment'}})" "$tmp/report.html" && node cli/index.js resolve "$tmp/report.html" --id example:intro --reply "Implemented in smoke test" && node cli/index.js export "$tmp/report.html" && (cd "$tmp" && node "$repo/cli/index.js" runbook --copy-only --no-open -o plan-review.html && test -f plan-review.html && test -f plan-review/briefs/instrumentation-brief.md && grep -q 'href="plan-review/briefs/' plan-review.html && grep -q '../plan-review.html' plan-review/README.md); code=$?; rm -rf "$tmp"; exit $code
